name: ocentra-enforcer
description: Standalone enforcement system with indexed Rust hard-fail rules, validator CLI, Codex skill, and MCP adapter.

interface.longDescription: Run strict indexed Rust policy checks by file, crate, diff, or workspace through a CLI, Codex skill, or MCP server. TypeScript and Python modules are reserved for later releases.
defaultPrompt: Validate this Rust change with Ocentra Enforcer.
Run Ocentra Enforcer against this crate.
